official_source_captures.title: Mayor Mamdani: The World Cup Belongs to New Yorkers

evidence.finding: The official page is dated June 10, 2026.
The retrospective says the administration created a dedicated, center-running eastbound bus lane on Broadway in Queens.
The project heading identifies Broadway from 69th Street to Roosevelt Avenue.
NYC DOT says it recently installed the eastbound center-running bus lane and directly identifies Q70 SBS riders.

temporal_adjudication.earlier_planning_literal: Mid June: bus lanes expected to be operational
temporal_adjudication.verdict: The lane was delivered by the dated June 10 retrospective, but neither retrospective source states the physical activation date. June 10 is retained only as an assertion as-of date; the forecast 'Mid June' is not promoted into realized onset evidence.

curation_decisions.project_status_basis: The merged project also contains ancillary May proposal components whose delivery is not established. The aggregate scalar remains proposed while delivered relations identify only the atomic center-running lane.
curation_decisions.basis: The retrospective evidence directly proves only the installed center-running lane and Q70 scope. It does not prove delivery of every component in the May proposal bundle.

identity_adjudication.basis: Both records identify the same 2026 Broadway bus-priority project in Queens, the same center-running eastbound lane, the same 69th Street/BQE-to-Roosevelt corridor, and the same Q70 SBS beneficiary.

source_authority_classifier.defect: Official city captures using publisher literals 'New York City DOT' and 'NYC Mayor's Office' were not recognized by the narrow authority alias matcher.
source_authority_classifier.resolution: Recognize New York City DOT, NYC/New York City Mayor's Office, and Office of the Mayor as official public publishers.
source_authority_classifier.anti_broadening: The classifier remains a bounded publisher-name match; it does not infer authority from arbitrary .gov-looking text or URLs.

route_anchor_adjudication.basis: The current GTFS row names Q70-SBS/LaGuardia Link, and official source evidence identifies Q70 SBS. The scalar Q70 value hid the more specific Q70-SBS identity already preserved in merged field history; the plus sign remains the feed's internal route-id convention.
